violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food being stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Missing hood vent over steamer and broken hood vent over the grill.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine needs to be cleaned more thoroughly.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Pans used to cover chicken on the grills need to be cleaned. Cook line cutting boards need deep cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Utility carts and dry storage racks need to be cleaned. Shelving underneath the flattop and the cooler under the cutting board need to be cleaned--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood vents over the grill need to be cleaned.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Was not emitting sanitizer. Not going into rinse mode. Need to use 3 compartment sink until repaired.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Dish washer needs cleane3d inside and out.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Faucet over the 3 compartment sink and hand sink was leaking at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors underneath the kitchen equipment are in need of a more thourough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing tiles in the kitchen.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop stored in the bucket and not in a proper position for it to dry.
